strategy: He hands each wizard three Malughast's Feint cards at the start; these are your setup tool, and the only Feints that do not trigger his cleanse.
Never use a regular Feint or Mass Feint on him: either makes him Cleanse Ward himself twice, which bypasses Indemnity and strips your trap. Use the provided Malughast's Feint instead.
He resists Balance 68% and has no boost school, so attack with your strongest non-Balance school.
Stack blades plus the Malughast's Feint, then land one big hit.
Watch his +120% damage and protected Curse, and shield his hits while you set up.
cheatNotes: He gives each wizard three Malughast's Feint cards at the start; use these to set up, since they do not trigger his cleanse.
Late arrivals get the three cards on the following round.
A regular Feint on him makes him Cleanse Ward twice, stripping the trap and beating Indemnity. Only use his Malughast's Feint.
Mass Feint triggers the double-cleanse too, so avoid it.
Malughast's Feint is the exception that will not trigger the cleanse, so it is your safe setup.
